name: Spyderbat
description: eBPF-powered runtime security and operational observability platform with causal chain tracing of container activity.

seo.title: Spyderbat — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Spyderbat: eBPF-powered runtime security and operational observability platform with causal chain tracing of container activity.

when_to_use: eBPF causal chain tracing of container process activity
Runtime security with behavioral baseline detection
Kubernetes workload anomaly detection without agents

pros: eBPF gives deep runtime visibility with low overhead
Causal chains trace attack paths across containers
Operational and security use cases in one agent
cons: Overlaps with Sysdig, Falco, and Wiz runtime
Smaller vendor than big security incumbents
eBPF kernel requirements limit older hosts
Security teams may already own Sysdig/Wiz
review.verdict: Strong eBPF runtime security concept, but crowded market dominated by Sysdig and Wiz makes differentiation hard.
review.best_for: Container security teams wanting causal attack-chain tracing without big-vendor lock-in.
review.not_for: Organizations already invested in Sysdig Secure or Wiz runtime.
